name: high_yield_ticker_filter
description: 000990.KS shows 77.6% swing accuracy with avg peak gain of 5.37% over 3.8 days - prioritize similar high-yield tickers
trigger: ticker historical swing_accuracy >= 75% AND avg_peak_pct >= 5.0 AND avg_peak_day <= 4
action: Flag as Tier-1 candidate and apply tighter entry timing around day 1-2 of signal
